author: Sheng-Kai Huang
name: No-FA3 Stack Combination — XSA-all + BigramHash 3072x112 + Parallel Muon + Mixed Q4/Q5/Q6
blurb: Non-record stack combination that runs without Flash Attention 3 (the runpod default pytorch:2.4.0 image lacks flash_attn_3). Achieves 1.1854 BPB (single seed) on 8xH100 SXM, beating the OpenAI baseline 1.2244 by -0.039 BPB. Pure sliding-window inference (stride=32, T=0.90), no SLOT, no TTT, no use of validation data during eval. Uses Mixed Q4/Q5/Q6 quantization (Gemma-4 inspired per-layer bit allocation) instead of Full Hessian GPTQ — simpler implementation, ~100 LOC quant pipeline.
technique_summary: 11L d=512 SP1024 + XSA-all + BigramHash(3072,112) + Parallel Muon + warmdown=2000/3500 + Mixed Q4/Q5/Q6 + LZMA9 + sliding-window eval (stride=32, T=0.90)
